description: Style Noteversace Pour homme by Versace has fresh accents of citruses, neroli, bergamot and rose de mai, hyacinth, clary sage, cedar and geranium, tonka bean, musk and amber. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
